Best for KYB Registered Businesses
This category includes any entity that has a formal legal existence with a government agency (e.g., corporate registry, tax authority). These businesses typically require a higher standard of documentation for compliance but unlock higher transaction limits and more features.

Biometric Verification

To ensure the security of your account, we need to verify that you are a real person. Please ensure you are in a well-lit area.

Scanning Guidelines
  • Remove glasses, hats, or masks.
  • Keep your face within the oval frame.
  • Maintain a neutral expression.
  • Avoid bright backlighting (windows).

Camera Preview will appear here

By clicking, you consent to biometric processing for identity verification purposes.

Proof of Funds

Volume Profile

Expected frequency of account usage.

Tax Compliance & Residency

Specify your tax obligations to ensure alignment with local and international revenue authorities.

Primary Tax Jurisdiction
If checked, you will be required to upload an Exemption Certificate in the next section.
Global Tax footprint (OECD/CRS)

Do you have tax obligations or residency in other countries?

*Required for businesses with permanent establishments or remote staff in foreign territories.
FATCA / CRS Declaration

We certify that the information provided regarding tax residency is accurate. We acknowledge that false declarations may lead to account suspension as per the Global Tax Transparency Framework.

Financial Behaviour & Risk Profile

Help us understand your typical transaction patterns to set appropriate account limits and security protocols.

Transaction Behaviour & Limits
$
Limits above $100k require enhanced manual review.
Political Exposure (PEP)

Important: Do any Directors, Shareholders (>10%), or Senior Managers hold (or have held) a prominent public position?

Global Counterparty Locations
List top 5 countries to avoid transaction delays.
AML Screening Enabled

By completing this profile, you acknowledge that the institution uses automated monitoring systems. Any deviation from the declared financial behaviour (e.g., sudden unexplained high-value transfers) may trigger a secondary review or temporary account freeze for your protection.

Security & System Intelligence

Configure your authentication preferences and set security thresholds for your business transactions.

Secure Transaction PIN
This PIN will be required for all bank payouts & external transfers.
$
Communication & OTP Channels

Where should we send One-Time Passwords (OTPs) and critical account alerts?

Smart Security Alerts
Unusual Transaction Behaviour

Alert me if my spending pattern deviates from Step 9 profile.

New Geographic Login

Notify if my account is accessed from a new country/IP.

Daily Volume Limit Reached

Get a notification when I approach 80% of my daily limit.

Ready to Launch?

By clicking "Finish", you confirm that all 10 steps of your application are accurate. Our compliance team will review your documents within 24-48 hours.

Payout & Settlement

Configure where your collected funds will be settled. You can update these details later in your Account Settings.

Enable Instant Payouts

Redirect collected cash directly to your settlement account as it arrives.

+1.2% Fee applies
Verify Payout Destination

To prevent fraud, we will send two micro-deposits (e.g., $0.012 and $0.045) to this account within 24 hours. Check your statement and enter the amounts below to fully activate payouts.

$
Settlement details are encrypted. Changes require 2FA authorization in the Settings > Payouts menu.

Final Attestation

Please review the following regulatory agreements. By checking the boxes below, you are legally binding your entity to our platform's operating standards.

Mandatory Agreements

I accept the general operating terms, fee structures, and service limitations. View Full Document

I consent to the processing of personal and business data as per global data protection standards.

I certify that the funds processed through this account are not derived from illicit activities and agree to ongoing monitoring.

I confirm that the tax residency information provided in Step 8 is accurate and complete.

Authorized Representative
This electronic signature is legally equivalent to a handwritten signature under the Electronic Transactions Act.
